1_iconocracy: Exploring iconocracy — a new form of power shaped by AI-driven image recognition — bridging visual, cognitive, and computational design disciplines.
2_write-it-personal: Analyzing the rise of personalized, expressive typefaces in contemporary type design and the experimental approaches driving this creative movement.
3_nomadismi-editoriali: A theoretical and practical investigation of artist's books in contemporary publishing, with interviews and a collaboration with artist Kensuke Koike.
4_parliamone-in-piazza: Graphic design for public discussions on migration across seven Venetian cities, communicating data through photography, music, art, and infographics.
5_folder-metaphor: A visual research practice collecting found images from vintage print media and reinterpreting them as posters, installations, and textile compositions.
6_pompilia: A contemporary type design revival of Roman Capitalis Monumentalis, featuring elegant display letterforms, ligatures, and a Greek alphabet extension.
7_adelphi: Revival of Hendrik van den Keere's 16th-century choral typeface from the Plantin specimen, balancing classical elegance with refined calligraphic detail.
8_impressum: A type revival blending three iterations of Bembo — Griffo's 15th-century original, Monotype's adaptation, and Mardersteig's 1972 cut — into one hybrid.
9_fano: Digital revival of Francesco Griffo's 1503 italic typeface, considered an archetype for all later italic models, rooted in Sanvito's chancery hand.
10_enea: Slab serif revival of Skeleton Antique No. 2 from a 1904 Stephenson, Blake & Co. specimen, balancing geometric structure with distinctive calligraphic charm.
11_stato-in-luogo: An editorial project exposing the depersonalization of Rome's historic center, driven by Airbnb expansion and the exodus of residents and local businesses.
12_trucks: An editorial design and research project exploring the visual culture, typography, and graphic language of trucks and commercial vehicle aesthetics.
13_ephemera-come-architettura-il-caso-gi: Research on ephemera as informational architecture, using the Giorgio Wenter Marini archive at IUAV Venice to reveal networks of design, media, and context.
14_trasformazioni-verbovisive: A historical analysis of verbo-visuality — the interplay between writing and image — from ancient pictograms through avant-gardes to contemporary design.
15_ci-sara-una-volta: An editorial design project blending typography and narrative to reimagine storytelling traditions through contemporary visual communication.
16_crumbs: A visual guide to data literacy for digital activism, revealing how online petition platforms invisibly collect and share personal data with third parties.
17_il-crampo-di-gesso: A visual exploration of the library as a space of latent images, guided by Borges' Library of Babel and the combinatorial possibilities found within books.
18_vinyl: An experimental stencil typeface inspired by vinyl record aesthetics, built from just 10 modular elements that are rotated but never resized or flipped.
19_fictional-brands-archive: A web-based archive documenting and cataloging fictional brands from film, television, literature, and other media through editorial and digital design.
20_brick-by-brick: A board game created with EMERGENCY NGO, simulating the construction of the Anabah Maternity Center in Afghanistan to foster empathy through play.
21_acculturation-display: A typeface exploring migration and cultural identity through letterforms shaped by migrant testimonies, with four vowel variants reflecting acculturation.
22_moti-dialogici: A visual research project seeking dialogue with water through photographic observation and carbon paper transcriptions of its ripple patterns and rhythms.
23_voltare-pagina: Research on art direction in independent fashion magazines, tracing the visual evolution of Kaleidoscope through its graphic designers and editorial formats.
24_pasta-divella: Visual identity redesign for Italian pasta brand Divella, refreshing the logo, color palette, and packaging with a focus on sustainability and shelf impact.
25_matematical-systems-on-natural-shape: Generative typography project using Python programming to apply mathematical and geometric systems found in nature to the creation of new letterforms.
26_micromort: A speculative and information design project exploring micromort risk units through exhibition design, data visualization, and critical visual communication.
27_palazzo-chiaramonte-steri: Visual identity proposal for Palazzo Chiaramonte Steri in Palermo, examining dynamic identity systems for museums through design research and practice.
28_introduzione-alle-non-razze: An editorial design and photography project challenging the concept of race through visual storytelling and critical discourse on human diversity.
29_lettere-come-immagini: Research on the relationship between letters and images in type design history, with experimental AI-generated lettering using Midjourney's blend tools.
30_the-flower-encyclopedia: A designed flower encyclopedia reclaiming the editorial format, featuring color-sampled palettes and 1:1 scale diameter references alongside botanical data.
31_uncanny-valley: An editorial design project investigating the uncanny valley phenomenon at the intersection of artificial intelligence, perception, and visual communication.
32_il-ruolo-della-tipografia-nell-arte-c: Research on the role of typography in cartographic art, examining the Touring Club Italiano as a case study in the history of map design and lettering.
33_general-journal-of-network-requests: An 860-page printed journal documenting network requests logged by uBlock Origin during 12 hours of browsing, visualizing web tracking and data privacy.
34_piana-di-marcesina-geografia-emotiva-: An editorial exploration of the Marcesina Plain through emotional geography, taxonomic poetry, and asemic typography reflecting its landscape and memory.
35_torviscosa-specimen-di-carattere-cont: A typeface revival inspired by the archigraphies of Torviscosa, an industrial company town, blending rational forms with organic contamination over time.
36_paroles-d-objets-kit-scenographique-m: A modular, reusable scenographic kit designed for Parisian auction house FauveParis, transforming window displays into narrative and aesthetic experiences.
37_idea-di-libro-libro-tovaglietta: A photographic book presenting 51 objects as triptychs — idea, physical form, and absurd recontextualization — inspired by Duchamp's readymade philosophy.
38_la-fede-addosso-dizionario-iconografi: An iconographic dictionary documenting the visual symbols of pilgrimage, exploring the material culture and devotional imagery carried by pilgrims.
39_in-solito: A modular magazine exploring everyday life in small Italian towns from fresh perspectives, with its first issue dedicated to Valeggio sul Mincio.
40_novelle-illustrate: An illustrated editorial project reimagining classic short stories through contemporary illustration and graphic design, bridging literary and visual narrative.
41_memes-in-fabula: Research on internet memes as evolving digital artifacts that shape language, identity, and communication in an era of constant social and generational change.
42_gan-eden: A digital botanical collection of AI-generated plants created through GAN networks, exploring the potential of machine learning to reimagine virtual nature.
43_greengleam-from-old-to-gold-alternati: Brand identity and app design for a sustainable fashion model that transforms used garments into new clothing through a network of local tailors.
44_halp: A UX/UI and branding project addressing information accessibility through intuitive web design, visual identity, and user-centered information architecture.
45_il-ruolo-espressivo-delle-variabili-v: Research thesis analyzing how visual variables in data visualization carry expressive qualities, combining perception theory with experimental observation.
46_specta-your-personal-eco-anxiety-sile: A speculative design project and brand identity for a fictional product addressing eco-anxiety, spanning packaging, web design, and exhibition formats.
47_the-glossy-glossary-of-drag: An editorial and typographic project celebrating drag culture through a visual glossary of its language, aesthetics, and performative vocabulary.
48_salvaguardia-e-valorizzazione-del-pat: An editorial and digital design project focused on safeguarding intangible cultural heritage through branding, user experience, and visual communication.
49_finding-a-way: Comparative analysis of award-winning wayfinding systems in public spaces, culminating in a modular signage system with custom pictograms and typography.
50_illustrazioni-semplici-per-emozioni-c: A 3D illustration system designed for Turin nonprofit Professione Creativo, communicating complex emotions about the university-to-work transition clearly.
51_warming-up-kids-laboratori-per-bambin: Visual communication workshops for children inspired by the Reggio Children atelier approach, exploring creative learning through space and materials.
52_toni-e-bepi: An illustrated editorial project combining typography and illustration in a narrative design exploration rooted in Italian visual storytelling traditions.
53_omne-quod-non-mutat-nox: Two physical card game editions expanding classic Lupus in Tabula, using black-on-black toner printing designed to be played under minimal ambient light.
54_descrizione-di-una-battaglia: A sociological atlas of football rituals, mapping emotional and military symbolism of the stadium through the visual metaphor of the cardiovascular system.
55_tac: TAC is an inclusive magnetic construction game for children of all visual abilities, promoting shared play and social connection through accessible design.
56_una-famiglia-contadina-dell-altopiano: An editorial project documenting the rural life of a peasant family on the Salto Plateau through illustration, typography, and ethnographic storytelling.
57_vi-e-il-riflesso-perduto: A children's picture book following Vi on a fantastical search for Venice's stolen reflection, developed within the Lagunando lagoon research project at IUAV.
58_conquista-del-passo-della-sentinella: Redesign of a 1937 military monograph on a forgotten Dolomites battle, using vector point synthesis and experimental typography for a contemporary reading.
59_oggetti-d-affezione: Book design for the IUAV Visual Design Lab annual compendium, featuring French fold pages and a flexible layout reflecting the evolving creative process.
60_fantasia-radicale-immaginare-il-proge: Revisiting Italian Radical Architecture of the 1960s as a stimulus for contemporary designers to embrace critical, expressive, and socially engaged practice.
61_arrivederci-e-grazie: Two publishing projects exploring thermal printing as creative medium, using anomalous burning processes to generate unexpected pareidolytic forms and figures.
62_mineralia-i-micro-paesaggi-delle-cent: An interdisciplinary book combining geology, design, and scientific communication to reveal the mineral micro-landscapes of Switzerland's Centovalli region.
63_no-future: A book translating a Wikipedia page into printed form, with color-coded cut edges revealing chapter structure — a transferable system for any online entry.
64_print-it: A sample book and kit introducing junior graphic designers to printing techniques, with hands-on comparisons and a focus on sustainable, recycled materials.
65_books-others-prize-i-migliori-libri-i: Catalog for the Books and Others Prize 2022, contrasting the analog book object with digital visual language through zooming, glitching, and multimedia effects.
66_di-tendenza-o-dipendenza: An editorial research project examining the boundaries between cultural trends and behavioral dependency, combining interviews and critical visual analysis.
67_coscienza-visiva: A generative book translating Italo Svevo's Zeno's Conscience into abstract animations accessible via augmented reality, visualizing the novel's inner emotions.
68_sulla-forma-tipografica: An editorial research project investigating the nature and evolution of typographic form and how letterforms communicate meaning beyond linguistic content.
69_magda-farmazine: An experimental fashion zine narrating Italy's independent creative scene, exploring identity through layered editorial design between the visible and oneiric.
70_fatevelo-da-vo: An archive of independent and militant publishing in Italy from 1960 to 1980, documenting counterculture newspapers, feminist magazines, and alternative press.
71_residui-urbani: A photographic and editorial project documenting urban residues — the overlooked traces, textures, and remnants that reveal hidden narratives of city life.
72_simbiosi: An editorial project narrating the visual relationship between nature and architecture through photography, illustration, and three linked book sections.
73_dta: Visual identity for the Terre e Acque district in Friuli, featuring a mosaic-inspired modular symbol system representing land and water with a custom alphabet.
74_eco-magazine: Issue zero of an art and photography magazine promoting sustainable, equal, and accessible creative discourse through curated international visual works.
75_sans-control: A dual-variant typeface resisting censorship — one clear and neutral, one covered in aggressive doodles — readable by humans but challenging to AI recognition.
76_cocci: Investigating Cerveteri's tombaroli — Etruscan archaeological looters — through interviews and multidisciplinary sources that reveal their cultural context.
77_just-playing: Visual analysis of gender expression in the American rap scene, examining how artists challenge and reshape identity through aesthetic and performative codes.
78_extraterra: Design research pushing terracotta beyond tradition through material experiments, new technologies, and innovative production methods at the Sant'Anselmo kiln.
79_back-to-the-real-life: A photographic exploration of the cruise ship as a performance machine and globalization microcosm, captured through an embedded anthropological art practice.
80_cvado1-archivio: A 352-page publication and digital archive of all projects from the first Master's in Visual Communication and Art Direction at Abadir Academy, 2022-2023.
81_metope: A generative typeface system designed at ISIA Urbino, enabling variable Latin letterforms and abstract shapes through adjustable structure, weight, and width.
82_climax: An editorial exploring peasant material culture and its bond with nature through ethnographic investigation and the micro-history of its last practitioner.
83_century-bug: A display typeface merging Gutenberg's Gothic Textura with late-20th-century pixel aesthetics, born from a dystopian collision of the 1400s and the year 2000.
84_beyond-the-shape: Exploring how digital technologies, generative design, and artificial intelligence expand the boundaries of typographic form and create new visual languages.
85_myconismo: Brand identity for Myconism, a fictional fungi-based religion, combining spore prints, expressive typography, and analog-digital techniques into ritual design.
86_otium-riscopri-te-stesso: An editorial and branding project reimagining the Roman concept of otium as a pathway to self-discovery and mindful living through contemporary visual design.
87_bivacco: A geometric display font inspired by Italian Alpine bivouac architecture, translating sharp diagonals and radical structural forms into distinctive letterforms.
88_dintorni: A collaborative magazine giving visibility to Veneto's creative scene, with its zero issue Asterismi featuring 17 contributors gathered through an open call.
89_paradiso-artificiale: Research on trabocchi, ancient Adriatic fishing machines, reimagining their contemporary role through multidisciplinary graphic projects and editorial design.
90_meme-e-computer-vision: Research analyzing how six computer vision systems perceive internet memes, comparing AI classification of these multimodal digital cultural artifacts.
91_archivio-guccini-catalogo-di-un-archi: An editorial catalog documenting the Guccini archive, tracing the history and evolution of a publishing collection through research-driven graphic design.
92_dettagli-come-il-taglio-influenza-l-e: Research on how image framing shapes visual perception and narrative, with case studies spanning painting, cinema, photography, and editorial graphic design.
93_oppa: A prototype accessibility app simplifying smartphone use for elderly and visually impaired users through customizable widget blocks and caregiver configuration.
94_dal-pnrr-al-pinqua: A two-volume publication visualizing Italy's PNRR investment data through generative P5.js typography and a rotating page design symbolizing transformation.
95_praxis-issue-01-practical-meditation: An editorial broadsheet and pocket manual reinterpreting garment construction as meditative practice, with open-source patterns for the Seasnake Shell Jacket.
96_lettere-urbane-il-ruolo-delle-insegne: Research on typographic signs as urban identity devices, examining Palermo's disappearing shop signage and its impact on public space perception and memory.
97_inatto-magazine: A creative magazine proposing new rights for designers — Issue 01 explores the legitimacy of copying through dialogue, challenging taboos in creative practice.
98_condito: App design and visual identity for Condito, a restaurant guide celebrating Italian culinary excellence through an intuitive, gesture-inspired playful interface.
99_giuly-julss: Visual identity for beauty salon Giuly Julss, blending refined external materials with warm, vernacular interior graphics reflecting the founder's personality.
100_lo-sono-nessuno: A collective editorial exploring civic activism, environmental awareness, and community participation as ways to resist creative self-referentiality.
101_botanica-postumana: A speculative botanical encyclopedia imagining genetically modified flora for 2050, combining AI-generated imagery with herbarium traditions to envision nature.
102_korea-travel-zine: A print and digital travel zine exploring South Korea through photography, acetate inserts, and an interactive web experience inspired by motion and perception.
103_low-polygon: Visual identity for electronic rock band Low Polygon, featuring a custom variable font and 3D animated alphabet that bridges the sonic and visual dimensions.
104_ccc-catania-civitas-civitatis: Three editorial volumes exploring how layout, format, and sequence reshape the meaning of photographic projects, examining Catania's vernacular architecture.
105_sound-atlas: An editorial and photographic project mapping sonic landscapes through visual design, capturing the relationship between sound, space, and image.
106_buona-domenica: Anthropological research on Rome's 8th Municipality through interviews and seven thematic booklets on nature, architecture, food, cinema, art, and community.
107_the-trapani-design-archive: A research archive rediscovering Western Sicily's graphic design heritage — logos, shop signs, labels, and visual artifacts from the twentieth century onward.
108_book-as-artwork-1960-1974: A study volume on artist's books from 1960 to 1974, comparing Germano Celant's pioneering catalog with later editions by Lynda Morris and Benjamin Buchloh.
109_onda: A typeface shaped by the frequencies of spoken letters, mapping the speech banana onto letterform distortions and distributed as a CD with a type specimen.
110_dysletter-grotesk: A variable typeface for dyslexia accessibility with three design axes enabling customized readability, featuring linear forms and a stable modern structure.
111_burghi-font: Variable display font inspired by Italy's 1980s Burghy fast food chain, with rounded, satisfying letterforms, two counter designs, and fast-food emoji glyphs.
